---
title: "Agriculture's Contribution to the Wisconsin Economy"
date: 2025-04-15
author:
  - name: Jeffrey Hadachek
    url: https://jhadachek.github.io
  - name: Steve Deller
page-layout: article
---

[{{< fa arrow-left >}} Back to Extension/Outreach](/wisconsinag/)

Wisconsin agriculture and food processing industries contribute $116 billion to the Wisconsin economy.

::: {.pub-links}
[{{< fa file-pdf >}} PDF](https://aae.wisc.edu/wp-content/uploads/2024/11/The-Contribution-of-Agriculture-to-the-Wisconsin-Economy.pdf){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}
:::
